statements.sql: select * from `users` where `id` = 2 limit 1
select * from `settings` where `created_by` = 2

select `permissions`.*, `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` as `pivot_permission_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `permissions` inner join `model_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` where `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` = 2 and `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` = 'App\Models\User'

select `roles`.*, `model_has_roles`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_roles`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `model_has_roles`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `roles` inner join `model_has_roles` on `roles`.`id` = `model_has_roles`.`role_id` where `model_has_roles`.`model_id` in (2) and `model_has_roles`.`model_type` = 'App\Models\User'
select * from `roles` where `created_by` = 2 and `created_by` = 2
select `name` from `permissions` inner join `role_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `role_has_permissions`.`permission_id` where `role_has_permissions`.`role_id` = 3
select `name` from `permissions` inner join `role_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `role_has_permissions`.`permission_id` where `role_has_permissions`.`role_id` = 4
select `name` from `permissions` inner join `role_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `role_has_permissions`.`permission_id` where `role_has_permissions`.`role_id` = 6
select `name` from `permissions` inner join `role_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `role_has_permissions`.`permission_id` where `role_has_permissions`.`role_id` = 8
select `name` from `permissions` inner join `role_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `role_has_permissions`.`permission_id` where `role_has_permissions`.`role_id` = 9
select `name` from `permissions` inner join `role_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `role_has_permissions`.`permission_id` where `role_has_permissions`.`role_id` = 10
select `name` from `permissions` inner join `role_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `role_has_permissions`.`permission_id` where `role_has_permissions`.`role_id` = 11
select * from `settings` where `created_by` = 1
select * from `settings` where `created_by` = 1

select * from `email_templates` limit 1
select * from `plans` where `plans`.`id` = 1 limit 1
select * from `settings` where `created_by` = 1

select table_name as `name`, (data_length + index_length) as `size`, table_comment as `comment`, engine as `engine`, table_collation as `collation` from information_schema.tables where table_schema = 'seborefa_erp' and table_type in ('BASE TABLE', 'SYSTEM VERSIONED') order by table_name
select `full_name`, `code` from `languages`
select count(*) as aggregate from `ch_messages` where `to_id` = 2 and `seen` = 0
select * from `settings` where `created_by` = 1
